headline: Evaluating Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) After Q1 Earnings Beat And Business Realignment Plan
summary: Cboe Global Markets (CBOE) drew fresh attention after first quarter 2026 results beat revenue and earnings projections, alongside a realignment plan focused on core derivatives, index products, and new prediction market initiatives. See our latest analysis for Cboe Global Markets. The earnings beat and realignment plan have coincided with strong positive momentum, with a 30 day share price return of 17.78% and a year to date share price return of 40.49%.
